commentaries.author: Ignatius of Antioch
commentaries.content: He who became a perfect man inwardly strengthening me.

commentaries.author: John Chrysostom
commentaries.content: Since this might seem like a great boast, see how quickly he adds: “I can do all things in Christ who strengthens me.” “Any achievement I have had belongs not to me but to the One who gave me strength.” –.
